title: Preparation of s/o/w emulsion using SPG membrane
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ck7bp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7egf6","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9doqm","text":"Solid-in-oil-in-water emulsion of miriplatin is prepared by pushing miriplatin suspension through 20 μm SPG membrane (SPG technology) using a syringe pump.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dkbpq","text":"0.8w% HCO solution is used as a outer aqueous phase.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare 10 mL half-saline and add 0.08 mg of Polyoxyethylene hydrogenated castor oil 60 (HCO 60). Use a starler to make the solution.
Aspirate the solution to 10mL syringe and connect it to a filter kit with 20μm hydrophilic-coated SPG membrage(SPG Technology Co.,Ltd). Push the whole solution into the filter kit.
Aspirate 3 mL of Lipiodol (Gurbet, Villepinte, France) in a syringe and add it to the bottle of miriplatin (Dainippon Sumitomo Pharma, Osaka, Japan), thus prepare miriplatin suspension.

Aspirate miriplatin suspension with a syringe and connect to the filter kit, which was prepared in step 2. First, aspirate air in the system and then set a syringe to a syringe pump. Set stirler beneath the filter kit. Start a syringe pump with a speed of 20ml/hr and start a stirler at the same time with a speed of 300rpm.
Increase the speed of stirler by 200ppm every 5 minuites.
creator: Daisuke Yasui
